im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/config.general_idea: Remove unused Jackson and Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer imports that are no longer referenced in the code.

Implement QR code generation endpoint with Redis state management.
Implement QR code scan handling endpoint.
Implement QR code status check endpoint.
Rename request parameter from user_id to userId in info endpoint.
Rename request parameter from user_id to userId in online endpoint.
Update Javadoc comments for clarity and consistency.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/contro.before:

Rename field user_sex to userSex to follow Java camelCase naming conventions.

Rename field self_signature to selfSignature to follow Java camelCase naming conventions.

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/entity.general_idea: Rename field user_id to userId to follow Java camelCase naming conventions.
Rename field user_name to username to follow Java camelCase naming conventions.
Rename field create_time to createTime to follow Java camelCase naming conventions.
Rename field update_time to updateTime to follow Java camelCase naming conventions.
Remove the password field from the user data entity.

im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/securi.general_idea: Reorder class members to place static constants before instance fields for better code organization.
Fix excessive whitespace in assignment statement to comply with code style standards.
Mark constructor-injected fields as final to enforce immutability and improve code quality.
Mark constructor-injected fields as final to enforce immutability and improve code quality.
Prevent potential NullPointerException by using literal string for equals comparison.
Standardize string emptiness check to use hasText for consistency with other checks.
Remove unused import of JsonUtil to clean up the code.
Rename local variable 'username' to 'userId' to better reflect that the principal represents a user identifier rather than a display name.
Update references to use the renamed variable 'userId' in token creation and response mapping.
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/securi.before: String token = JwtUtil.createToken(username, 24, DateField.HOUR); map.put("username", username);
im-auth/src/main/java/com/xy/auth/securi.after: String token = JwtUtil.createToken(userId, 24, DateField.HOUR); map.put("username", userId);
